name: Monitoring Stack
description: A bare-metal monitoring stack for Proxmox LXC with Grafana, Prometheus, Loki, Alertmanager, Alloy, and a local node_exporter target.

notes.text: Grafana, Prometheus, and Alertmanager are exposed on the container IP; Loki, node_exporter, and Alloy remain local-only.
Use the standard `update` command inside the container to upgrade the installed monitoring packages and restore the managed configuration files.
`cAdvisor` is intentionally not included in this container profile.
